# In the Mouth of Madness

Monsters: Eldritch horrors (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Eldritch%20horrors%209d977fe97699437880fbc4b55651f78c.md), The Old Ones (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/The%20Old%20Ones%20707b1ba5634747c7acbac562396348bf.md), Curses (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Curses%208d8f367d6fdd47a580868227f4274a51.md), Demon zombies (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Demon%20zombies%20874b2902d6174d44ba82c2aaf6f70a2a.md), Beasts (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Beasts%203fefb3b547bb4b4985c3ef149b16290a.md)
Motivations: Cosmic horror (../../Features/Cosmic%20horror%207015e32dadb042b995663e84d5b48388.md), Isolation (../../Features/Isolation%20330cda5056f64459b8d0d46a66ed21a2.md), Supernatural forces few people can see (../../Features/Supernatural%20forces%20few%20people%20can%20see%201dbf653b6a894de39bbc08de004b862f.md), Dreamlike (../../Features/Dreamlike%20ce5b83035c894e0da2137f0584297c4d.md)

Plot is driven by MC desire: True
Story scale: Full story (../Story%20scales/Full%20story%20faaea9bcaf0f43b5ae79dfa06b96be34.md)
Traversal reasons: Unraveling mystery (../Traversal%20reasons/Unraveling%20mystery%20b272303db39d4255a6d3cbf1a70b8925.md)

A movie with many great ideas that are ultimately bungled.

This movie is largely listed as an inspiration due to its first half.  The second half collapses.
